message:
feat(interpreter): implement comparison, bitwise, unary, delete, instanceof, and in operators

Replaces stub implementations with correct semantics:

Comparison: eval_relational (numeric + string lexicographic) and
eval_equality (abstract vs strict with negate flag) for all 8 comparison
operators (Lt/Lte/Gt/Gte/Eq/StrictEq/NotEq/StrictNotEq).

Bitwise: eval_bitwise with i32 semantics and 5-bit shift masking for
BitAnd/BitOr/BitXor/Shl/Shr/Ushr.

Arithmetic: Dedicated eval_mod (with div-by-zero NaN) and eval_exp
(non-negative exponent).

Unary: eval_unary_neg, eval_unary_plus, eval_bit_not, LogicalNot
(truthy inversion), TypeOf (type string), Void (produces undefined).

Other: instanceof checks constructor_function on heap objects. in-operator
checks property key existence. DeleteProperty removes from heap.
JumpIfNullish branches on null/undefined.

Adds Value::is_nullish(), typeof_name() helpers. HeapObject gains
constructor_function tracking set during Construct. Extracts shared
property_key() helper deduplicating key coercion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
